query:
ALTER TABLE `users` MODIFY COLUMN `role` enum('user','expert','admin','viewer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user';
UPDATE `users` SET `role` = 'viewer' WHERE `email` = 'williamtsengring@gmail.com';
